caption: Against a solid black background, a white circular logo is centrally positioned in each frame. The logo features stylized, cursive text that reads "God's Good" with the phrase "all the time" written in a smaller, simpler font underneath. In the bottom-left and bottom-right corners of the overall image, as well as the center of the screen, the name "Subhashis Singrayan" appears in a small, white sans-serif font. The visual composition remains completely static across the frames, with no changes in the position, size, or content of the logo or the surrounding text. There are no people, movements, or other objects visible, creating a consistent and unchanging image throughout the sequence.
